_meta.description: Wowpedia-validated WoW API and Event reference used by pantella-wow.

combat_log_events.name: SPELL_CAST_SUCCESS
combat_log_events.description: Fired when a spell cast succeeds. Subtype of COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED.

combat_log_events.name: UNIT_DIED
combat_log_events.description: Fired when a unit dies. Subtype of COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED.

combat_log_events.name: SPELL_AURA_APPLIED
combat_log_events.description: Fired when a buff/debuff aura is applied to a unit.

game_state_fields.name: player_name
game_state_fields.description: Player character name, sourced via UnitName('player') in Lua.

game_state_fields.name: player_level
game_state_fields.description: Player character level, sourced via UnitLevel('player') in Lua.

game_state_fields.name: zone
game_state_fields.description: Current zone name, sourced via GetZoneText() in Lua.

game_state_fields.name: in_combat
game_state_fields.description: Whether the player is in combat, sourced via UnitAffectingCombat('player') in Lua.

game_state_fields.name: group_size
game_state_fields.description: Current group/party/raid size, sourced via GetNumGroupMembers() in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.name
pet_api_fields.description: Pet name, sourced via UnitName('pet') in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.family
pet_api_fields.description: Pet creature family (e.g. Wolf, Cat), sourced via UnitCreatureFamily('pet') in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.health
pet_api_fields.description: Pet health percentage, derived from UnitHealth('pet') / UnitHealthMax('pet') * 100 in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.is_dead
pet_api_fields.description: Whether the pet is dead, sourced via UnitIsDeadOrGhost('pet') in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.lore
pet_api_fields.description: Pet lore/description text from the Pet Journal, sourced via C_PetJournal.GetPetInfoByPetID() in Lua.

pet_api_fields.name: pet.pet_token
pet_api_fields.description: Internal token classifying companion type: PET, MOUNT, or COMPANION.

radiant_event_types.name: zone
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when player enters a new zone/area.

radiant_event_types.name: combat
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when player enters combat (regen disabled = combat start).

radiant_event_types.name: chat
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when a nearby player says something in /say chat.

radiant_event_types.name: gossip_show
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when the player opens a gossip/dialogue window with an NPC.

radiant_event_types.name: trade_show
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when a trade window is opened with another player.

radiant_event_types.name: quest_accepted
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when the player accepts a quest.

radiant_event_types.name: quest_complete
radiant_event_types.description: Fired when the player completes/turns in a quest. Maps to QUEST_TURNED_IN in Lua.
